phrase.text: I’m an AB on the Riga Star in the Latvian <Shipping> Company.
Since childhood I have been interested <in> boats, ships and maritime transport.
I have always liked operating machines and learning new practical skills therefore I decided to <enter> the Riga Maritime School at the <age> of 15.
During my training I went to <sea> two times as a trainee.
When I left Maritime School I started <working> for the Latvian Shipping Company as an AB.
I love the sea and I <enjoy> my work very much.
My duties as an AB include keeping <watch> during which I steer the vessel, do lookout duties and help the Navigating Officer.
As an AB I have to be able to operate <deck> machinery, such as the windlass or winches during mooring or unmooring operations.
During <cargo> operations I have to operate cargo gear.
